title: 11 herbal teas to alleviate toothache in older adults
description: Sanguinaria canadensis teas have been traditionally used to help alleviate toothache pain due to their analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant contains a compound called sanguinarine, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. Sanguinarine has been shown to have a numbing effect on the nerves, reducing pain and inflammation in the affected area.
